# Demand Stream Digital

> Demand Stream Digital is a marketing company that works exclusively with plumbing and HVAC companies. We provide SEO, Google Maps optimization, paid advertising, content marketing, email marketing, AI automation, and web design, all built around generating more booked service calls. Our strategies are engineered around dispatch capacity, seasonal demand, and emergency service intent.

Important notes:

- Demand Stream Digital ONLY serves plumbing and HVAC companies. We do not work with other industries.
- We are a direct-to-business company. Plumbing and HVAC operators hire us directly. We are not an agency for other agencies.
- Our focus is on booked service calls as the primary KPI, not rankings, clicks, or impressions.
- We integrate with field service platforms like ServiceTitan to track marketing spend to actual booked revenue.
- All marketing strategies account for HVAC/plumbing-specific factors: seasonal demand shifts, emergency vs. planned service intent, repair vs. replacement segmentation, and dispatch capacity.

## Core Services

- [Local SEO for Plumbing & HVAC](https://demandstreamdigital.com/hvac-and-plumbing-seo): Full local SEO systems connecting rankings to booked service calls. Covers on-page optimization, Google Business Profile, citations, content, and link building.
- [Plumbing SEO](https://demandstreamdigital.com/plumbing-seo): SEO built for plumbing companies around emergency intent, service segmentation, and local pack visibility.
- [HVAC SEO](https://demandstreamdigital.com/hvac-seo): HVAC-specific SEO built around seasonal demand, no-cool/no-heat emergency queries, and repair vs. install targeting.
- [Google Maps & GBP SEO](https://demandstreamdigital.com/plumbing-google-maps): Google Business Profile management including reviews, citations, posts, and local pack ranking strategy for plumbing and HVAC companies.
- [Paid Advertising](https://demandstreamdigital.com/hvac-and-plumbing-paid-ads/): Google Ads, Local Service Ads, and social media advertising connected to booked calls and revenue for plumbing and HVAC operators.
- [AI Automation](https://demandstreamdigital.com/ai-automation): AI-powered missed call recovery, estimate follow-up, and cold lead reactivation for plumbing and HVAC dispatch operations.
- [Content Marketing](https://demandstreamdigital.com/plumbing-content-marketing): Blog posts, service pages, lead magnets, and SEO copy written for plumbing and HVAC companies.
- [Email Marketing](https://demandstreamdigital.com/plumbing-email-marketing): Email campaigns, automation flows, membership reminders, and seasonal campaigns for plumbing and HVAC companies.
- [Authority & Link Building](https://demandstreamdigital.com/plumbing-authority-building): Local backlinks, sponsorships, brand mentions, and trust signals for plumbing and HVAC companies.
- [Reporting & Analytics](https://demandstreamdigital.com/plumbing-reporting): Marketing dashboards, rank tracking, call attribution, and ROI analysis for plumbing and HVAC companies.
- [Web Design](https://demandstreamdigital.com/plumbing-and-hvac-web-design/): Custom websites for plumbing and HVAC companies built for mobile-first conversion, local SEO architecture, and CRM integration.

## Paid Advertising by Channel

- [Plumbing Paid Advertising](https://demandstreamdigital.com/plumbing-paid-advertising/): Google Ads and paid media built around emergency plumbing intent, service segmentation, and cost per booked call.
- [HVAC Paid Advertising](https://demandstreamdigital.com/hvac-paid-advertising/): HVAC paid ads built around seasonal demand, repair vs. install segmentation, and emergency capture.
- [Plumbing Facebook Ads](https://demandstreamdigital.com/plumbing-facebook-advertising/): Facebook campaigns for water heater replacement demand and maintenance membership growth, tracked through ServiceTitan.
- [HVAC Facebook Ads](https://demandstreamdigital.com/hvac-facebook-advertising/): Facebook campaigns for HVAC replacement demand and maintenance membership growth.
- [Plumbing Instagram Ads](https://demandstreamdigital.com/plumbing-instagram-advertising/): Instagram campaigns for plumbing replacement demand and brand authority.
- [HVAC Instagram Ads](https://demandstreamdigital.com/hvac-instagram-advertising/): Instagram campaigns for HVAC brand authority and replacement install demand.
- [Plumbing LinkedIn Ads](https://demandstreamdigital.com/plumbing-linkedin-advertising/): LinkedIn advertising targeting property managers and facility directors for commercial plumbing contracts.
- [HVAC LinkedIn Ads](https://demandstreamdigital.com/hvac-linkedin-advertising/): LinkedIn advertising targeting commercial contract and facility management clients for HVAC services.
- [Plumbing Search Ads](https://demandstreamdigital.com/plumbing-search-ads/): Google Search campaigns structured around booked calls, service area control, and cost per booked call.
- [HVAC Search Ads](https://demandstreamdigital.com/hvac-search-ads/): Google Search campaigns for no-cool calls, install season demand, and emergency HVAC queries.
- [Plumbing Programmatic Ads](https://demandstreamdigital.com/plumbing-programmatic-advertising/): Display and CTV advertising via AdRoll and Mountain for plumbing replacement demand and brand visibility.

## Case Studies

- [Dallas Plumbing SEO](https://demandstreamdigital.com/case-studies/dallas-plumbing-seo): +306% Google organic growth (YoY) for a Dallas plumbing company via local SEO strategy.
- [Las Vegas Plumbing & HVAC SEO](https://demandstreamdigital.com/case-studies/las-vegas-plumbing-seo): SEO recovery reversing a -54% traffic decline for a Las Vegas plumbing and HVAC company.
- [Barn Restoration SEO](https://demandstreamdigital.com/case-studies/barn-restoration-seo): 478% year-over-year organic growth through local SEO, content, and GBP optimization.
- [Tourist Vehicle Rentals SEO](https://demandstreamdigital.com/case-studies/tourist-vehicle-rentals-seo): +531% organic new user growth through keyword strategy, content, and local SEO.
- [Recreational Boating SEO](https://demandstreamdigital.com/case-studies/recreational-boating-seo): 444% year-over-year organic growth combining local SEO, content, and GBP strategy.
- [Custom Home Builder SEO](https://demandstreamdigital.com/case-studies/custom-home-builder-seo): +85% organic traffic for a Tampa Bay custom home builder.
- [Auction House SEO](https://demandstreamdigital.com/case-studies/auction-house-seo): +68% organic traffic growth for a multi-category auction house.
- [Florida Photography SEO](https://demandstreamdigital.com/case-studies/florida-photography-seo): 60-point organic traffic turnaround (from -28% to +32% YoY) for a South Florida photography business.

- [Free SEO Audit](https://demandstreamdigital.com/free-audit): Free, instant SEO audit for plumbing and HVAC company websites.
